memory_entries.text: In the recurring SQLite product dataset, electronics is group g2: items_g2 has ref_id, ttl, avg_rtg, prc (integer), prc_usd, str_nm, main_cat, feat_lst, img_ct; taxn_g2 has ref_id, cat_lvl, cat_nm. Department level is cat_lvl=0 (mostly 'Electronics'), and the broadest category just below department is cat_lvl=1. Office products is group g1 with taxn_g1; g3 has no taxonomy table in this instance.
